Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account is associated with a lower estimated risk, because it is associated with a lower estimated risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the loan is for purchasing a used car relies on financial ratios and account data, because traditional predictive frameworks rely on financial ratios and account data, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that there are no known savings accounts is positively associated with higher estimated credit risk, because lower savings categories are positively associated with higher estimated credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험을 낮추는 신호로 인식되며, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다. [1]
중고차량 구매 목적은 전통적인 예측 본 모델에서 금융 비율과 계좌 데이터에 기반한 요인으로 알려져 있으며, 본 모델 역시 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 식별합니다. [2]
저축 내역 없음은 일반적으로 신용 위험을 증가시키는 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 오히려 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다. [3]
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
